Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-12-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Renee Schaible, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wealth Properties, Inc., a California corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Margo Foster, was sworn and direct examined.
EXH 1- Amenment to Lease-----------------ID/EVID.
EXH 2- Tenant's Ledger Sheets------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Petrolphysics, Inc., a California corp. as follows:
Damages $49,473.53
Prejudgment Interest $4,187.47
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $411.63, for a total of $56,897.63
Judgment signed in open court.
